name: claude-widget
description: A lightweight, always-on-top desktop widget for monitoring Claude Code usage in real time.

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build -w @claude-widget/desktop
scripts.dev: npm run build:core && npm run dev -w @claude-widget/desktop
scripts.package: npm run build:core && npm run package -w @claude-widget/desktop
scripts.package:dir: npm run build:core && npm run package:dir -w @claude-widget/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @claude-widget/core && npm run typecheck -w @claude-widget/desktop
